content.en:
Ten days later.

Under the protection of the Dark Lord, Ye Tian came to the Holy City of the Terran Sacred Domain.

The Ghost Gate, a powerful treasure, has been transferred to the Holy City and placed in the Holy City's newly established Ghost Gate Tower.

Therefore, the gate of hell is opened, and those who enter the gate must come to the holy city.

Holy City.

This was the first time Ye Tian had come here, and as soon as he entered the Holy City, he felt that this place was extraordinary.

"The Holy City is much more majestic than the Tianlan Giant City!"

Ye Tian exclaimed.

In the Holy City, there are almost no human races below the great god level, basically all of them are human races above the great god level, and there are even many cosmic gods.

The large amount of strong aura transmitted from all around made Ye Tian's heart frightened.

"This is the core holy city of the human race!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the ghost gatehouse.

The Ghost Gate Tower is a newly established building, which is dedicated to preserving the Supreme Treasure Ghost Gate, and a large number of strong people have been stationed for a long time.

A powerful treasure like the Ghost Gate is of little use to individuals, but it is too useful for a clan.

The Terrans will not use the Ghost Gate to change the Terran's cultivation path, but they can use the Ghost Gate to gain some more benefits from the Thirteen Ghost Realms.

At this time.

There are many strong people gathered in the Ghost Gate Tower, and these strong people are all people who want to enter the Ghost Gate.

However, according to what Kunwu Supreme said, the human race will not send too powerful people to enter the ghost gate, and at most allow the cosmic god to enter the ghost gate.

Because it is not that the stronger the cultivation, the more you can get benefits in the ghost realm, only the soul body can enter the thirteen ghost realms, and although the soul after the cosmic god level can be strengthened little by little, it is not too strong.

Therefore, the strength of the souls of those masters and cosmic gods is not very exaggerated, but the masters and cosmic gods have special powers that can protect their souls, so the souls are not defective.

But if you enter the ghost gate, it is equivalent to losing your body and fighting with your soul, and the advantage of the cosmic god over the god-level powerhouse is not too great.

Moreover, the price to be paid for letting the souls of the Lord and even the Heavenly Venerable and Supreme enter the Ghost Gate is too great, so the price and gain are not worth it.

Therefore, this time, the human race allows the cosmic gods to enter the ghost realm through the ghost gate at most, and the number of cosmic gods must be very small.

Among the human races who have entered the ghost realm, most of them are galaxy-level and galaxy-level, and there are relatively few great god levels, and Ye Tian is one of those less great god levels.

With the passage of time, people are basically all together.

In the ghost gatehouse, a Tianzun appeared.

"I've seen the Holy Punishment Heavenly Venerable!"

"I've seen the Holy Punishment Heavenly Venerable!"

"I've seen the Holy Punishment Heavenly Venerable!"

All the people bowed to the Tao together.

Ye Tian was the first time he had seen this Holy Punishment Heavenly Venerable, but he had also heard of the name of the Holy Punishment Heavenly Venerable.

After all, the Terrans have only 78 powerhouses above the realm of Tianzun so far, and each of them is a big man sitting on one side, the real top high-level of the Terran.

A Dominator like the Dark Lord is just an ordinary small high-level, and he doesn't have much real power, otherwise he wouldn't have been sent to him as a guard.

And the authority of the Holy Punishment Heavenly Venerable is greater, he is subordinate to the Holy City, he is the deputy city lord of the Holy City, in charge of the security and system of the Holy City, and he is also one of the founders of a special organization of the human race, the Temple of Reward and Punishment.

If there is a big crime in the human race, it will basically be arrested by the reward and punishment hall, and the small crime will be dealt with by the highest hall of the human race.

It can be seen from this that the status of the Holy Punishment Heavenly Venerable is very high.

After the Holy Punishment Heavenly Venerable, there were several masters, and they opened the ghost gate together.

"Let's go, I'll take you to the ghost gate!"

Holy Punishment Heavenly Venerable Dao.

"Yes!"

The people answered.

Rumble!!!!

A teleportation formation emerged, and everyone was in the teleportation formation.

Wow!

Ye Tian and the others were all teleported to a special space in the Ghost Gate Tower.

--------

in a dark space.

A strange black gate 10,000 meters high appeared there, exuding a trembling aura.

There are countless strange laws and black light above the Black Gate, which fills the entire Black Gate with a strange atmosphere.

"Ghost Gate!"

Ye Tian recognized it at a glance.

Holy Punishment Tianzun and the others stood in front of the Black Gate, fusing the black crystals into the Ghost Gate.

When the black crystal is integrated into the ghost gate, the light of the ghost gate is getting stronger and stronger!

And at this time.

Someone suddenly exclaimed: "That's a soul crystal! Oh my God, so many soul crystals have been integrated into the ghost gate, this price is too great!"

"Soul Crystal!"

Ye Tian was no stranger to the name of this treasure.

Soul crystal is a treasure that can restore the soul, for example, if a person is injured in battle, he can absorb and refine the soul crystal to restore the soul injury.

In addition, the Soul Crystal is also an aid to create Soul Defense Treasures.

But a soul defense treasure only needs a soul crystal the size of a grain of rice is enough, and one soul crystal is enough to create hundreds of soul defense treasures.

Therefore, in the universe, the value of soul crystals is very high, and it is also one of the strategic materials of a race.

But now, Holy Punishment Tianzun and others have integrated a large number of soul crystals into the Ghost Gate, which shows how high the price they have paid.

However, the human race should have harvested countless resources after destroying the ghost clan this time, and the ghost clan has a lot of soul crystals, so it can bear such a price.

It didn't take long for the Holy Punishment Heavenly Venerable to stop merging with the soul crystal, and the light of the Ghost Gate was also intense to an extreme.

"Open!"

The Holy Punishment Heavenly Venerable shouted, and a huge black vortex appeared on the ghost gate.

And in the black swirl, there are dense black lattices.

"When you enter these black grids, don't resist, your soul will be extracted by the ghost gate and teleported to the thirteen ghost realms. In the ghost world, the only things that can be brought back are inheritance, and other treasures cannot be brought back, so if you can refine them in the ghost world, try to refine them, otherwise when you teleport back, those things will still remain in the ghost world. When everyone returns, remember to leave a copy of the inheritance brand to the Terrans!"

Holy Punishment Heavenly Venerable Dao.

"Yes!"

Everyone nodded in response.

The Terrans have paid a huge price to open the ghost gate, if they have obtained the inheritance, they should naturally be imprinted to the Terran and make some contributions to the development of the Terrans, if everyone is selfish and unwilling to contribute, then how can the Terrans grow.

For example, if those supreme beings are selfish and don't contribute the supreme gods, then the human race will not be able to give birth to so many powerful children of the universe.

Ordinary people can be selfish, but to the extent that Ye Tian and the others can't be selfish anymore.

Whew!!

A strong man flew into the black grid in the whirlpool of the Ghost Gate, and Ye Tian also flew into one of the grids.

The lattice is large enough to hold hundreds of people.

When Ye Tian entered the lattice, chains flew out, linking all Ye Tian's hands and feet, as if they were tied.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian's consciousness was lost, and the immortal soul was extracted.

Then, the immortal soul was teleported into the thirteen ghost realms connected by the ghost gate.

In the blink of an eye, all the immortal souls of these human races were teleported away, but their physical bodies were well preserved in the grid, and it was difficult for anyone to hurt their physical bodies, unless it was to destroy the ghost gate.

......

I don't know how long it has been, Ye Tian regained consciousness.

At this time, Ye Tian was defenseless, and his whole person was completely in a state of immortal soul, and a faint soul light bloomed on his body.

With a thought, a suit of clothes appeared on his body.

This is not a real clothes, just clothes woven with soul power and soul energy between heaven and earth.

"It's so rich soul energy, and it's ownerless soul energy, and the soul can be preserved for a long time in such a place. This should be one of the thirteen ghost realms!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The ghost world looks no different from the ordinary world, but there is no vitality here, there is only soul energy and a certain eerie aura, Ye Tian called it ghost energy!

"Roar!"

Not far away, a beast's roar came.

Then, a creature similar to a black panther appeared in Ye Tian's sight.

Subconsciously, Ye Tian turned on the copying talent and checked the talent of this black panther.

Although the body is not there, the soul is, and the ability to copy the talent can naturally still be used.

In an instant, the talent of this black panther creature appeared in Ye Tian's sight.

Talent Identification
Species: Soul Leopard
Soul Defense Talent: Top

Soul Claw: Top

Soul Roar: Top

......

Seeing these talents, Ye Tian was very interested.

In the universe, soul talents are relatively rare, and most of them are relatively ordinary talents, and such creatures seem to be soul creatures, born with soul talents.

Although the soul leopard in front of him has an average talent, maybe there is a very awesome soul talent here.

"Come here by the right time, maybe you can copy a few awesome soul talents!"

Ye Tian thought.

Swish!

The soul leopard attacked towards Ye Tian, Ye Tian was about to use his sword skills to kill this soul leopard, and suddenly remembered that he was now in a soul state, and many methods could not be used.

"Soul Spear!"

A spear appeared, instantly piercing the soul leopard's body.

The next moment, the body of the soul leopard turned into ashes and dissipated between heaven and earth.

The soul strength of this soul leopard is not strong in the first place, at most it is equivalent to the soul strength of the emperor level, so it is not Ye Tian's opponent at all, and it is too normal to be killed by Ye Tian in seconds.

"Keep looking!"

Ye Tian was going to find more soul creatures to see if he could find some awesome talents.

However, he also copied a few of the talents of the soul leopard just now, anyway, there is no limit to the number of times he can copy his talents now, although he is not afraid of wasting the number of copies he has.

And he doesn't know much about the ghost world now, and he doesn't know how to find the inheritance, so it's better to get more benefits in his own way.

As for inheritance, let it be!
